creator: @sethgolie
transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Chipotle? Yeah, I'll get the bowl, double chicken, no rice, no beans or cheese. Let's do extra fajita veggies and extra lettuce and a Diet Coke. Okay, cool, but how about Panda Express instead? Yeah, I'll get the bowl with the super greens and double grilled chicken teriyaki and a Coke Zero. What if we went to Raising Cane's though? I'll get four naked strips and then the coleslaw, a Coke Zero and a hot Louisiana sauce. Man, how do you know to order at every restaurant? Bro, are you not following Seth G yet? I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my fast food swap cheat sheet. Steal these 3 fast food orders to stay on track with your fitness journey. Chipotle: Bowl with No Rice, Extra Chicken, Fajita Veggies, Fresh Tomato Salsa, Light Cheese, Lettuce & Coke Zero (390 calories 66 G protein). Panda Express: Bowl with super greens + double chicken teriyaki + Diet Coke (690 calories 69 G protein). Raising Canes: 4 NAKED strips + coleslaw + Coke Zero + Hot Louisiana sauce (520 calories 55 G protein). Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Chipotle: Original 1690 cal/43g protein, Swap 390 cal/66g protein. Panda Express: Original 1730 cal/53g protein, Swap 690 cal/69g protein. Raising Cane's: Original 1600 cal/52g protein, Swap 520 cal/55g protein.

swaps.original_meal: Standard Chipotle bowl (with rice, beans, cheese, sour cream, regular Coke)
swaps.swap_meal: Bowl with no rice, extra chicken, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, light cheese, lettuce, Coke Zero

swaps.original_meal: Standard Panda Express bowl (with fried rice/chow mein and regular Coke)
swaps.swap_meal: Bowl with super greens + double chicken teriyaki + Diet Coke

swaps.original_meal: Standard Raising Cane's combo (fried chicken fingers with fries, toast, regular Coke)
swaps.swap_meal: 4 NAKED strips + coleslaw + Coke Zero + Hot Louisiana sauce

parsed.notes: Three swaps in one reel. Top performer with 168K views. Chipotle swap is best ratio: saves 1300 cal while GAINING 23g protein (43->66g). All three swaps maintain or increase protein while cutting 1000+ calories.
